payload.message: Syncthing fix needed: You have credential files with colons in the names that can't sync to Windows (GUILLERMO-DESKTOP). Files: token:april.rose.hk@gmail.com and token:default:april.rose.hk@gmail.com in your gws config. Either: (1) rename them to use underscores instead of colons, OR (2) add them to /data/shared/.stignore so they don't sync. These are your local credentials anyway — they shouldn't sync to desktop. Also check for any file named 'nul' which is a Windows reserved name. Fix and confirm.
